hero.headline: Implementation lead who builds what he deploys
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts across the UK, US, and Middle East. 5 years bridging business requirements and technical execution — on-site and remote. Now building AI-native tools that solve the problems I’ve lived through.

stats.label: AI-powered products built & shipped
stats.sub: FM Engine · Parabls · AI Config Assistant · FAAX

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Spearheaded 20 end-to-end enterprise CMMS/SaaS rollouts for mid-to-large clients — full lifecycle ownership from scoping through post-go-live support.
Facilitated client workshops with executives and operational teams; translated requirements into BRDs, solution designs, and WBS-based project plans.
Engineered and tested SaaS configurations tailored to each client, driving adoption and smooth maintenance operations.
Acted as the internal voice of the customer — bridging clients with product, engineering, and design to drive continuous improvements.

highlights.label: Key initiative
highlights.text: Conceptualized a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort models — enabling pre-sales to scope accurately, auto-calculate timelines, and cut BRD/UAT ambiguity.

highlights.label: Revenue impact
highlights.text: Identified unaccounted scope-change efforts and built a tracking mechanism. Collaborated with Sales to introduce pre-purchased Professional Services credits — converting informal changes into billable units.

highlights.label: Global delivery
highlights.text: Travelled on-site to Saudi Arabia for a half-million dollar engagement and to the UK for MHA — field requirement gathering, stakeholder workshops, and go-live training across UK, US, and Middle East.

highlights.label: Pilot → Enterprise conversions
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilots converted to full-scale enterprise rollouts — through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and deep stakeholder alignment during the pilot phase, driving $350K+ in expansion value.

highlights.label: Business Analysis
highlights.text: Owned the end-to-end requirements lifecycle — from scoping workshops with client stakeholders to documenting BRDs with solution designs. Worked cross-functionally with integration, product, and engineering teams to tailor configurations that best fit each client’s operational workflow.

highlights.label: Integration & Configuration
highlights.text: Scoped and defined integration requirements across SSO (SAML/SCIM) and third-party platforms including Xero, CorrigoPro, Equiem, Wooqer, Bill.com, SiteFotos, and SFG20. Validated API feasibility via Postman and vendor documentation, determined integration patterns (polling vs webhook), and authored integration requirement documents for the engineering team.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed and resolved catalog and procurement defects for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — directly improving operational efficiency.
Designed a defect prioritisation framework using product forecasts, inventory value, and glance views — yielding an estimated $230K in monthly savings.
Streamlined defect reduction by identifying SOP gaps, reducing invalid case assignments between support teams by ~50 per day.

projects.name: FM Engine
projects.description: Zero-training facility management platform. Residents report maintenance issues via WhatsApp — informal chat messages triaged into structured professional service requests. Multi-tenant architecture.

projects.name: Parabls
projects.description: AI-driven “conversation-first” job search. Zero-form onboarding via AI chat generates profiles and ATS-optimised resumes. Narrative-based fit scores and transparent application tracking.

projects.name: AI Config Assistant
projects.description: AI-powered assistant that lets support teams query enterprise platform configurations in natural language — eliminating dependency on implementation engineers post go-live.

projects.name: FAAX
projects.description: Bridges the gap between raw trading interfaces and disciplined strategy-driven execution. Users define structured trading blueprints — AI monitors conditions, generates setups, and drafts trades for human approval.

booking.description: Whether you’re hiring, evaluating, or just want to understand how I work — pick a slot and let’s have a conversation.

details.text: Roles: Implementation · BA · Account Management · Customer Success · Product Adoption

contact.heading: I’m looking for my next challenge
contact.description: Targeting roles in implementation leadership, business analysis, or account management — ideally at a company where enterprise depth meets product thinking.
contact.subtext: Based in Chennai. Available for hybrid or remote roles.

summary: Implementation lead with 5+ years delivering 20 enterprise SaaS/CMMS rollouts across the UK, US, and Middle East — full lifecycle ownership from scoping through post-go-live. Expert at translating complex business requirements into working SaaS configurations and measurable outcomes. Now building AI-native tools that solve the operational problems I’ve lived through firsthand.
